Parties: Guangzhou Yunqiao Information Technology Group Co., Ltd. (USCC: 91TEST0000000000XX) and Wuxi Hanxing New Materials Co., Ltd. (USCC: 9135ZZ0000000000XY).
Transaction: non-binding term sheet for a minority strategic investment and technology collaboration in silicon carbide substrates.
Issuer and security: Issuer is Wuxi Hanxing New Materials Co., Ltd.; proposed issuance of preferred equity with customary rights; no public offering contemplated.
Conditions precedent: internal approvals; if restructuring triggers SSE STAR or SZSE ChiNext listing plans, CSRC filing and exchange review will apply; SAMR filing if thresholds met.
MNPI: parties confirm this term sheet relies on publicly announced information only, including stale notices on the Jiangsu Equity Exchange dated 2023-05-10; no inside information as defined under the Securities Law is solicited.
Insider management: if any non-public facts later arise, the Issuer will open an insider list and seal files until disclosure, but no trading in A-shares is contemplated by either party.
Data compliance: processing of personal information will follow PIPL, CSL, and DSL; no collection of PI of minors under 14; data localization on PRC servers; cross-border transfers require CAC standard contract filing or security assessment as applicable.
Employment workflow: any employee transfers will use standard HR forms (fields: Name, Resident ID, DOB, Department) with masking at source, and Resident ID copies must not be exported or emailed overseas.
Cross-border IT: back-up synchronization to a Hong Kong service center may be piloted only after CAC approval; inquiries may be directed to the compliance mailbox at compliance@yunqiao.example.cn.
Single identified role for migration: the IT security engineer responsible (DOB 1991-07, Wuhan base, employee code E-1044, corporate WeCom handle sec_ops_02, BYOD handset IMEI ending 8888, corporate card account tail 4321, device model Bailin T7) will administer credential cutover without accessing content data.
Device policy: only device serials and coarse location are logged for MDM purposes; no personal chat content, health data, or continuous location tracking will be enabled.
Quasi-identifier caution: generic descriptors such as “born in the 1990s” or “working in Shanghai” are not used to single out individuals and shall be aggregated or removed.
Disclosure: no selective disclosure; any material cooperation to be announced on the company website and, if applicable, pre-disclosed through CSRC channels after signing.
Miscellaneous: PRC law governs; disputes to be submitted to Shenzhen Court of International Arbitration; notices to dealroom@yunqiao.example.cn and legal@hanxing.example.cn.
